template: per-head K vs V direction perturbation — Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (cross-model replication)

parameters.perturbation_scope: per-head (1 of 8 KV heads at ALL positions and ALL layers)

prediction_outcome: Hybrid A+C (35%+20% = 55% combined): answer heads exist AND less redundancy on analog model. H5 same index = unpredicted.
key_finding: HEAD 5 is primary answer-routing head on BOTH Qwen and Llama (same KV head index!). Llama mean K-acc=50% vs Qwen 89% — head-level redundancy is encoding-dependent. V-immunity absolute: 264/264 (456/456 total). K>V at all 8/8 heads.
evidence_impact: Major cross-model replication: answer heads confirmed on 2nd model family. H5 convergence across architectures suggests universal specialization. V-immunity now decisive at per-head level across 2 models. Head-level redundancy encoding-dependent adds to encoding taxonomy.
next_planned: H5 x position interaction on Llama OR multi-head perturbation threshold OR H5 on Phi (MHA)

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION discovered (H5 primary on BOTH models).

positional_dissociation.status: Dose-saturated: 5% dose STILL saturates Llama accuracy. Text gradient dose-independent. Encoding-dependent at 5%.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute.

head_level_analysis.status: CROSS-MODEL: H5 primary on both Qwen+Llama. Redundancy encoding-dependent (89% vs 50%). V absolute 456/456.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for all major findings: 4 families, 5 variants. Per-head now on 2 models.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + head-level redundancy encoding-dependent confirmed.
